Bowel-prep cheat sheet · Pediatric Gastroenterology
Internal staff reference · Not for patient distribution

BIG PREP dosing per weight band

{{CHEATSHEET_DOSING_ROWS}}
Band Dulcolax (bed+day) Tot. mg MiraLAX caps Tot. g Gatorade Cup Start

Infants <15 kg — two options (clinician choice)

{{CHEATSHEET_INFANT_ROWS}}
Sub-band MiraLAX caps Tot. g Mix in (Pedialyte or clear apple juice)

MiraLAX schedule: {{CHEATSHEET_INFANT_SCHEDULE}}. Patient handouts: u15kgPEG / u15kgEnema.

Contingency rescue plan if stools not clear/pale yellow after 4 h

{{CHEATSHEET_CONTINGENCY_ROWS}}
Band Evening rescue Morning rescue
finish ≥ NPO before procedure		 Hard stop
incl. BIG PREP		 If still not clear

Trigger: 4 h after starting BIG PREP without clear/pale-yellow watery stool. NPO clears: 2 h SCC / 3 h PMCH — morning rescue must finish ≥ that window before procedure time. If still not clear after rescue: call office {{PRACTICE_PHONE}}. Infants <15 kg: not applicable — see <15 kg block.

Pre-cleanout (suspected constipation) option A + daily maintenance

{{CHEATSHEET_PRECLEANOUT_ROWS}}
Band Option A (intensive) Start Daily maintenance

Locations

{{CHEATSHEET_LOCATIONS_BLOCK}}

When to call — post-procedure red flags office {{PRACTICE_PHONE}}

{{CHEATSHEET_RED_FLAGS_BLOCK}}

Medications to hold (7 days before)

{{CHEATSHEET_MEDS_BLOCK}}
